rationale: The cited paper develops a dynamic incidence–brand choice model for promotion-induced switching with forward-looking inventory effects, and the citing paper similarly models promotion effects through household incidence/choice dynamics, stockpiling, and preemptive switching. Given this strong methodological and construct overlap (plus same JMR promotion domain), the citation is plausibly foundational/comparative rather than an obvious incidental mention, so it should be retained for full judgment.
